summary: Completed testing of Client History feature. All backend API tests (7/7) passed. Frontend UI tests passed - modal opens correctly with client history section showing summary cards and history list.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/client-history/{user_id} rejects regular user auth (403) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/client-history/{user_id} returns correct structure (total_visits, total_spent, total_cancelled, first_visit, last_visit, history) - PASSED
Backend: Response values have correct types (int for visits/cancelled, numeric for spent, list for history) - PASSED
Backend: History list items have correct structure (service_name, date, time, status, amount) - PASSED
Backend: Non-existent user returns empty history with 0 values - PASSED
Backend: first_visit and last_visit dates are in YYYY-MM-DD format - PASSED
Frontend: Business dashboard loads correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Calendar navigation to March 2026 works - PASSED
Frontend: Bookings displayed for selected date (March 29, 2026) - PASSED
Frontend: Client name is clickable (cursor-pointer class) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal opens with title 'Detalle del cliente' - PASSED
Frontend: Modal shows client contact info (email, phone) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal shows current booking info (service, professional, date, time, total) - PASSED
Frontend: 'Historial del cliente' section visible in modal - PASSED
Frontend: 3 summary cards visible (Visitas, Gastado, Canceladas) - PASSED
Frontend: History items displayed with data-testid='history-item-{n}' - PASSED
Frontend: 'Cliente desde marzo de 2026' text visible - PASSED
Frontend: Loading spinner shown while fetching history - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint (server.py lines 1299-1340) correctly aggregates client booking history from bookings collection
Frontend state management (lines 59-61) properly handles bookingDetail, clientHistory, and historyLoading states
onClick handler (line 760-770) correctly loads client history when clicking on client name
Modal UI (lines 1626-1675) displays all required elements: summary cards, history list, and 'Cliente desde' text
API function getClientHistory in api.js (line 185) correctly calls the endpoint
History items use data-testid for testing (line 1653)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing client 'Pedro Martinez' with 3 confirmed bookings in March 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client history feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Endpoint GET /api/businesses/my/client-history/{user_id} requires business auth. (2) Modal opens when clicking client name in booking card (requires view_client_data permission). (3) Modal shows 'Detalle del cliente' title with contact info, current booking, and 'Historial del cliente' section. (4) Summary cards show Visitas (green), Gastado (blue), Canceladas (red). (5) History list shows up to 15 past bookings with service_name, date, amount. (6) 'Cliente desde [fecha]' shows first_visit date. (7) Test user Pedro Martinez has 3 bookings on March 23, 29, 30 totaling $450.

frontend_modal.trigger: Click on client name in booking card (requires view_client_data permission)
frontend_modal.title: Detalle del cliente

client_history_feature_verification.cliente_desde: Shows first_visit date formatted as 'Cliente desde [month] de [year]'
